caption: A man wearing a silver, peaked wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, and a red bowtie sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background is a wall adorned with framed photographs and clothing displays, including a black vest on a mannequin and a "LEE" branded garment. Two logos appear on screen: a circular logo on the left containing the text "THE TALK PODCAST" and a logo on the right reading "GOSS TALK JOY". The man remains stationary throughout the sequence, maintaining a neutral facial expression and looking slightly to his left. There is virtually no movement between the frames, capturing a static shot of the man as he prepares to speak or listens in the studio environment.
